claim: The SET layer (selection-aware Q_wide) is primary; a POINT is issued ONLY under certificates C1..C8. The certified point interval is always a subset of Q_wide and never excludes a set-allowed value.
rule: No file/constant changes before the fresh N>=10000 prospective run. The prospective generator (point_cert/pcprospgen.py) and seeds are committed BEFORE execution; the runner is hash-gated. STOP RULE: one CATASTROPHIC invalid point certificate on the prospective -> burn the hold-out, preserve, do not patch. The burned N=5000 NASI hold-out is used only as dev regressions.
authorized_on_pass: reporting only. DROPLET CAUSAL-CONTINUITY PILOT and EXP-SC-01 remain BLOCKED.
